summary: Iteration 26 - Sponsor Checkout Feature Testing COMPLETE. All features tested and verified: Two-column Sponsor section layout with 'Become a Sponsor' button, full contribution form (Name, Email+Verify, Amount with currency badge, Message, Anonymous checkbox), Verify button turns green on valid email, POST /api/payments/sponsor-checkout creates Stripe session and returns url+session_id, payment_transaction created with item_type='sponsor', 'Shine a Light' row in Admin Page Headers tab with font controls.
critical_code_review_comments: SponsorSection.jsx: Well-structured with two-step UX (CTA button -> form), uses CurrencyContext for auto-detected currency badge, email verification is format-only (MOCKED), handles loading state on submit button

payments.py: /api/payments/sponsor-checkout endpoint (lines 160-209) creates CheckoutSessionRequest with correct metadata for sponsor type, stores transaction with item_type='sponsor', validates amount > 0
PageHeadersTab.jsx: STATIC_PAGES array includes {key:'sponsor', label:'Shine a Light'} at line 39, enables full hero title/subtitle editing for sponsor section
seed_data_creation: Created test sponsor transactions during pytest run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sponsor checkout feature fully functional. /api/payments/sponsor-checkout creates Stripe sessions for sponsor contributions. Transactions stored with item_type='sponsor'. Page Headers tab includes 'Shine a Light' row for hero editing. Email verify is MOCKED (format validation only). Phone OTP also MOCKED.
